paper_definition: Delay should measure completed-task latency under paper semantics
current_computation: Average of delays from completed tasks only
observed_problem: Zero-completion sweeps can still look valid when plotting delays
effect_on_outputs: Leads to zero/negative-zero-looking Figure 10 delay outputs
required_fix: Validate against episodes with actual completions

paper_definition: Drop ratio should count dropped tasks over total tasks
current_computation: Dropped tasks divided by total tasks
task_filtering: No additional filtering beyond terminal outcome counts
observed_problem: One-task or sparse-task episodes make the ratio saturate quickly
required_fix: Ensure sweeps create enough completed tasks to avoid trivial saturation

paper_definition: Average reward should reflect validation episode returns
task_filtering: Filters out None and NaN entries
observed_problem: Can hide sparse episode structure and flatten differences between policies
required_fix: Use real validation episodes and preserve sample-size metadata

paper_definition: Total reward should accumulate terminal task rewards across the episode
current_computation: Sum of terminal rewards and penalties
observed_problem: Can look decisive even when episode has tiny sample size
effect_on_outputs: Used as a proxy in Figure 9 and 10 outputs
required_fix: Keep but validate against richer traces

paper_definition: Throughput should count completed tasks or processed work under paper semantics
observed_problem: Remains zero in many current sweeps
required_fix: Validate with episodes that produce completions

paper_definition: Action distribution should count selected actions by type across validation episodes
current_computation: Derived from sparse current-simulator action counts
task_filtering: Action counts only from current simulator artifacts
observed_problem: Distribution does not faithfully preserve paper validation groups
required_fix: Build from real validation episodes and larger sample sizes

paper_definition: Timeout drop rate should isolate deadline-based failures
current_computation: Implicit inside dropped-task count and terminal status handling
observed_problem: Timeout sensitivity is muted in current traces
required_fix: Generate more completions so timeout effects become measurable

paper_definition: Deadline violations should be separately measurable under paper semantics
current_computation: Not explicitly exposed in the current figure outputs
effect_on_outputs: No direct Figure 9/10 output for deadline-violation sensitivity
required_fix: Expose deadline-violation metric in future validation artifacts
